_comment: Copy to profiles.json and edit. http:true => backend runs as ONE shared @playwright/mcp HTTP server per profile (multi-agent: several MCP clients share it). Omit http (or false) => classic stdio child per proxy. Each profile = one identity: userDataDir (ABSOLUTE, persistent, one browser at a time) OR isolated:true (ephemeral, unlimited parallel sessions). PIN the version (avoid @latest in prod). ntfyUrl (optional) = your NTFY topic for alerts (or PW_MCP_NTFY_URL env). Nothing hardcoded — only official @playwright/mcp documented flags (--user-data-dir/--isolated/--caps; --host/--port added by the supervisor).
